generated_oml:
instance VehicleSensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "sensor networks for real-time data collection from the Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSensorData
]

instance VehicleSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSensorNetwork
]

instance VehicleSensorRawData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "raw sensor data from vehicle sensor network"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "geometric model from CAD representations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CADTool
]

instance CADTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design (CAD) for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralAnalysisService
]

instance StructuralAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "structural analysis for safety assessment using CAD models"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralSafetyInsight
]

instance StructuralSafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "structural integrity assessment based on CAD model analysis"
]

instance VehicleDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "analytical model using differential equations for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance CalibratedVehicleDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "calibrated analytical model using differential equations for dynamic behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngine
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "calibration algorithms for parameter estimation"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "state estimation for parameter updates using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "estimated system parameters for accurate model calibration"
]

instance SimulationEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "differential equation-based simulation engines for dynamic behavior analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "predictive simulations of physical behavior using calibrated physics-based models"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "predicted system behavior under current conditions for operational decisions"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "fault detection algorithms for anomaly identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "fault detection for anomaly identification in system components"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "detected anomalies indicating potential faults in the Physical Twin"
]

instance SupervisoryController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "supervisory controllers for system monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "supervisory control for maintaining system safety and optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SupervisoryControlInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "control recommendations for maintaining system integrity"
]

instance OptimizationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "optimizers for performance enhancement"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "optimization services for performance enhancement based on system analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "recommended adjustments to improve system performance"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "real-time monitoring of system safety and operational optimality using sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "real-time safety assessment based on sensor data and model predictions"
]

instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "operational optimality assessment for performance enhancement"
]
